ErrorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
ErrorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

Entrypage.title: Contribution Registration
Entrypage.instructions: Here you can submit an electronic contribution report to Almenni-Lífsverk lífeyrissjóður. A claim is created in the online bank upon submission of the contribution report.
Entrypage.termTitleTooltip: The default term is automatically set on the rows but can be changed for each row later.
Entrypage.createContributionInstructions: The following values must be selected

Tablepage.instructions: Here you can submit an electronic contribution report to Almenni-Lífsverk lífeyrissjóður. A claim is created in the online bank upon submission of the contribution report.
Tablepage.addRowDescription: Enter the employee's national ID to add a new row
Tablepage.addRowInlineInstructions: Enter national registry ID to create a new row
Tablepage.overviewInstructions: Please review the information below and if it is correct, click the Send button to send the contribution report to Almenni-Lífsverk lífeyrissjóður. To change the contribution report, click the Back button.
Tablepage.cancelDialogTitle: Are you sure you want to cancel?
Tablepage.cancelDialogDescription: This action will delete the current contribution and you will return to prerequisites.
Tablepage.cancelDialogWarning: You will need to start over.
Tablepage.changeEmployerDescription: Enter the national registry ID of the new employer
Tablepage.contributionTypeDescription: When enabled, you can enter amounts for employer supplementary contributions instead of percentages
Tablepage.changeContributionTypeDescription: Choose the type of contribution to submit

Receiptspage.instructions:
The contribution report registration is now complete and has been sent to the contribution department. A claim has been created in your online banking.

You can download a PDF of the submitted contribution report by clicking the Print-friendly button below. When payment has been received, the contribution report is posted and fund members can see their contributions in their overview on the fund member website.

If you want to send another contribution report for a different period, click Homepage.

Errors.retryable: This error may be temporary. You can try again.
Errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check your input and try again.
Errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Network connection failed. Please check your internet connection.
Errors.API_ERROR: Server error occurred. Please try again later.
Errors.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
Errors.UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to perform this action.
Errors.FORBIDDEN: Access to this resource is forbidden.
Errors.CONFLICT: A conflict occurred. The resource may have been modified.
Errors.RATE_LIMIT: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
Errors.TIMEOUT: The request timed out. Please try again.
Errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
